minimumThreshold: result rows 與 run count match

purpose: Only fail-closed when a degraded quote state is explicitly present in the payload.
minimumThreshold: formal publish does not depend on shared quote coverage
missingAction: 未證明；不因缺 shared quote 本身阻擋權證 formal publish
notRequiredReason: 權證 formal publish 不依賴 shared quote；正式 source 是 warrant_flow_scan_results / v_warrant_flow_latest_complete_run。
degradedPayloadRule: 若 payload 明確帶 degraded source/fallback 狀態，必須 block latest，避免壞水源被誤當正式證據。

degradedPayloadRule: 若 payload 明確帶 degraded source/fallback 狀態，必須 block latest，避免壞水源被誤當正式證據。
